# Build Execution Summary

- Status: completed
- Actions: added a focused regression test for detail-panel close navigation, introduced a small `detail-panel-navigation` helper, updated `apps/web/src/components/view-toggle.tsx` to record the project-view origin before opening an item, updated `apps/web/src/components/detail-panel.tsx` so Escape/backdrop/Close use history-back only when the panel was opened from that project view and otherwise fall back to `router.replace(...)`, and refreshed the build-stage artifacts with fresh bounded-fix-cycle verification evidence.
- Files touched: `apps/web/src/components/detail-panel.tsx`, `apps/web/src/components/detail-panel-navigation.ts`, `apps/web/src/components/view-toggle.tsx`, `tests/phase5-detail-panel-navigation.test.mjs`, `.planning/current/build/build-request.json`, `.planning/current/build/build-result.md`, `.planning/current/build/completion-advisor.json`, `.planning/current/build/status.json`
- Verification: `node --import tsx --test tests/phase5-detail-panel-navigation.test.mjs` passed (2/2); `npm run lint` passed; `npm run typecheck` passed; `npm run build` passed; `npm run test:contracts` passed (45 tests, 0 failures, including Phase 3, Phase 4, Phase 5, and the new navigation regression coverage). `npm run build` emitted existing non-blocking Next.js workspace-root and Node deprecation warnings but no build errors.
